name: grep
description: Searches a file for a regex pattern and returns matching lines with their line numbers. Supports optional line-range scoping (search within start_line..end_line only) and context_lines to show surrounding lines around each match. Can also read a specific line range without a pattern.

path.description: Path to the file to search or read.

pattern.description: Go regular expression to search for. Required unless using range-only mode (start_line + end_line).

start_line.description: First line of the search or read window (1-indexed). Must be paired with end_line.

end_line.description: Last line of the search or read window (1-indexed, inclusive). Must be paired with start_line.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding lines to show around each match (default 0).
